meaning: National Union of Mineworkers (英国)全国矿工联盟
examples: That remainder is compared to 0 (it is the remainder 0 and, thus, num is divisible by 3).
The function takes a single parameter named num.
"Num of request" is the number of HTTP requests.
It has always denied that NUM members are being asked to work longer hours.
After the ruling, Mr Kitchen said it was "regrettable" the NUM had to bring the case.
